overview: Concept Grow Institute is a comprehensive study app for Indian students. Admins can create and manage courses, quizzes, notes, and assignments, as well as manage student accounts, track performance, and send announcements. Students can browse courses, view lessons, take quizzes, see their scores, and receive announcements.
features: Role-based access: Admin and Student roles with protected routes
Admin content management: courses, lessons, quizzes, notes, assignments
Student course browsing, lesson viewing, and enrollment
Quiz-taking with instant scoring and history tracking
Admin student management: view, search, deactivate students
Analytics dashboard for student performance tracking
Admin announcements with student notification center
Student profile with progress summary and score trends
